twitter_thread: 17 gadgets tested in 007 First Light: 5 were dead weight, 4 were mission-critical.
Smartwatch and laser cutter saved my skin 8 times in stealth missions.
Grapple and zip line gadgets were useful in only 2 levels: 'The Embassy' and 'The Warehouse'.
Don't waste a slot on the camera gadget: it's useless in 95% of situations.
Hacking device disabled 12 alarms for me, but didn't touch drones.
4 essential gadgets can shave 30 minutes off your mission time.
What's your most underrated gadget in 007 First Light? #gadgets #firstlight
pack.linkedin: After testing 17 gadgets in 007 First Light, I found that 4 were crucial to completing the mission. The smartwatch and laser cutter were vital in 8 stealth mission scenarios, while the grapple and zip line gadgets were only useful in 'The Embassy' and 'The Warehouse' levels. The camera gadget was a waste of space, and the hacking device had limited use. By choosing the right 4 gadgets, I shaved 30 minutes off my mission time. What gadgets have you found to be most effective in 007 First Light?
